title: aspidosperma ellipsocarpum
intro: Aspidosperma ellipsocarpum is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as the Apocynaceae family. It is a type of evergreen tree native to South America, known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever and pain, as well as treating wounds and infections. Aspidosperma ellipsocarpum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its alkaloids can also be isolated and used in pharmaceutical preparations.
